store_info.description_short: Self-hosted CalDAV web calendar with month/week/day/agenda views, calendar sharing, public ICS links and optional Google Calendar sync.
description_long: FreeShard WebCalendar is a self-hosted CalDAV calendar for your shard. It offers month, week, day and agenda views, recurring events, calendar sharing between shard users, public ICS links, and app-passwords for connecting external CalDAV clients (Thunderbird, DAVx5, iOS, macOS).

Internally it bundles a Radicale CalDAV server for storage and an optional background worker that two-way-syncs linked Google calendars. You can also link external CalDAV accounts (e.g. Nextcloud) per user; their credentials are stored AES-encrypted.
